visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair in pigtails and a beige hoodie smiles broadly at the camera in a crowded outdoor setting. (2) She holds up a colorful lanyard featuring fruit patterns and the '7-ELEVEN' logo, showing it off to the camera. (3) A sequence of different young women, all in similar beige hoodies, appear in individual shots, each holding the same colorful lanyard and smiling or speaking excitedly at the camera. (4) One woman in a white top and yellow skirt gives two thumbs up and claps her hands excitedly while wearing the lanyard. (5) The first woman reappears, clapping and gesturing towards the lanyard with high energy. (6) A man in a vibrant, fruit-patterned shirt with a large gold medal around his neck shakes hands vigorously with a woman in a striped shirt. They are standing in an outdoor lot with white tents in the background, both laughing and giving thumbs up to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 恭喜啦. (2) [Subtitle]: 恭喜, 耶. (3) [Subtitle]: 恭喜你, 好棒喔. (4) [Subtitle]: 哇, 你好棒喔, 恭喜你戰勝了自己. (5) [Logo]: @7-ELEVEN. [Slogan]: 7K FRESH FUN RUN.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 5 unique women in close-up sequences, 1 main male creator at the end, and a crowd of at least 10 people in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Five young women in casual beige hoodies and sporty skirts; one man in a loud, fruit-patterned white shirt with a gold medal.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An active outdoor event area with white festival tents, orange traffic cones, and large crowds of people under a clear sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice shouts 'Gongxi la!' with high arousal and excitement over upbeat acoustic guitar BGM. (2) Each visual cut is accompanied by a new female voice offering congratulations like 'Gongxi!' or 'Hao bang o!' with clear, high-pitched vocal quality and rising intonation. (3) Background sounds of laughter and a distant crowd murmur are consistently present under the primary speech. (4) A male voice enters the mix, shouting loudly with extreme dominance and arousal, thanking the event host ('Ban niang!') and praising the event in a rapid, energetic speech rate. (5) The audio concludes with overlapping laughter and enthusiastic vocal cheers from both the male and female speakers.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Sequential Greetings -> Climactic Event Appreciation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the successful completion of a 7-Eleven sponsored fun run and the vibrant, joyful atmosphere shared by participants and organizers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of 7-Eleven logos on event materials and verbal praise for the quality of the '7K Fresh Fun Run' event.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes a social-media-native montage style to convey high emotional valence and brand engagement.
